series_metadata.series_description: The Disability Relief database is an access database that enables processing of Employer Disability Relief Reimbursement Applications. The Disability Relief database contains: the date applications are received, conferences docketed, a copy of the unsigned Determination Order, the date orders were issued and published, Notice of Informal Conference for Employers, Notice of Informal Conference for Representatives and Disability Relief special reports used by the Disability Relief Unit created from the raw data. The Disability Relief special reports used by the Disability Relief Unit are the Orders to Date issued 3 days of Determination Date yearly, Orders to date issued 15 days of Determination Date yearly, Orders to Date issued w/in 90 days of Receipt yearly, Over 90 days old aging report, Applications to Date-Aging, Average award Percentage, Attorneys average award percentage, Attorneys average award percentage by disability, Orders to Date issued w/in 180 days of Receipt Yearly, Orders to Date Issued w/in 365 Days of Receipt Yearly, Orders to Date w/Waivers Yearly, Orders to Date Yearly, Applications to Date- Monthly/Yearly, Rep Average Award Percentage, Disability Relief Hearing Report, Granted Detail List and Denial/Dismissal Detail List.
